summary: Iter 252 (Linked Offline Draft Finalization) verified end-to-end. Backend pytest: 9/9 PASS — 5 new tests in test_linked_offline_draft_finalization_iter252.py (happy path, idempotent, conflict-already-paid, conflict-not-found, doc-lookup both numbers) + 4 regression tests in test_close_wizard_credit_refactor_feb2026.py. Live API regression file (test_iter252_live_endpoints.py, 6/6 PASS) covers: GET /api/sync/offline-reconciliation?status=open returns {items:[],count:0}; POST /api/admin/reconcile-orphan-offline-draft validates payload (400 missing fields, 400 confirm without admin_pin, 401 wrong pin via _wrong_pin path); /api/invoices/by-number unknown→404; /api/view/{code} unknown→404. Frontend audit-center route (`/audit`) opened with super-admin: 'Offline Reconcile' tab visible (data-testid='offline-reconcile-tab'), tab content renders 'Offline Reconciliation Queue' header, status filter dropdown (Open/Resolved) works, empty state 'No open reconciliation entries.' shown — exactly matches the GET API. All 5 conditional testids (draft-pending-offline-{id}, offline-pending-banner, offline-synced-banner, linked-receipt-banner, divergence-warning) confirmed present in source via grep; runtime exercise requires seeded pendingSales / draft / linked invoice on a branch-assigned org user (super admin has no branch).
critical_code_review_comments: routes/sync.py: /admin/reconcile-orphan-offline-draft expects body field name `off_invoice_number` (not `offline_receipt_number` as the review_request paraphrased). Confirmed working — test_iter252_live_endpoints.py asserts the canonical field name. Doc/spec wording slightly drifts from actual handler.

routes/sync.py: 400→404 ordering — when payload is missing required fields, handler raises 400 before checking record existence; this matches REST convention (validate input first). Test adapted to accept 400|404 where appropriate.

Frontend route is `/audit` (App.js:265), not `/audit-center`. The review_request says 'navigate to /audit-center' — actual mounted path is `/audit`. AuditCenterPage component name + sidebar text both say 'Audit Center' so wording is fine, just confirm path in any docs.
OfflineReconciliationTab cleanly handles empty state with check-icon + 'No open reconciliation entries.' message. Status filter dropdown surfaces Open|Resolved.

PrintEngine.js banners (offline-pending-banner / offline-synced-banner ~line 369/379) and DocViewerPage.jsx (linked-receipt-banner / divergence-warning ~line 1834/1850) — testids correctly placed; conditional rendering keys are kind==='draft_finalization_offline' + linked_offline_receipt_number presence.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for routes accessible to super-admin: Offline Reconcile tab + empty state verified. Conditional banners (draft-pending-offline-*, offline-pending-banner, offline-synced-banner, linked-receipt-banner, divergence-warning) confirmed at source level only — runtime needs branch-assigned org user with seeded data.

test_credentials: janmarkeahig@gmail.com / Aa@58798546521325 (super admin, organization_id=None, no branch). For UI banner runtime exercise use test_org_admin@regression.local / RegressionPass!2026 (auto-seeded with branch).
seed_data_creation: test_linked_offline_draft_finalization_iter252.py seeds + cleans up draft invoices on TEST_ORG='test-org-iter252' via _raw_db. Live test creates no persistent data — all targets are deliberately-nonexistent receipts to exercise error branches.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reachable endpoints/UI pass. To exercise the conditional frontend banners at runtime: (1) login as test_org_admin@regression.local / RegressionPass!2026 (branch-scoped); (2) seed an IndexedDB pendingSales row with kind='draft_finalization_offline' + draft_invoice_id pointing at an existing for_preparation draft → opens UnifiedSalesPage Draft Orders panel and shows 'draft-pending-offline-{id}' yellow badge; (3) call _finalize_draft_offline directly via Python with a seeded draft → produces an invoice doc with linked_offline_receipt_number set, then GET /api/invoices/by-number/<OFF#> and /api/invoices/by-number/<DRAFT#> both resolve to same record; opening DocViewerPage on that doc should render data-testid='linked-receipt-banner' (and divergence-warning if offline_items_diverged or payment_diverged). PrintEngine banners can be checked by wiring printQueue with the same envelope. All five testids confirmed present at source (UnifiedSalesPage.js:5384, PrintEngine.js:369/379, DocViewerPage.jsx:1834/1850).
rca_of_the_issue: No bug — refactor verified working as designed. Offline draft finalizations now correctly route via kind='draft_finalization_offline' to _finalize_draft_offline (routes/sync.py:17), preserving canonical invoice_number and stamping linked_offline_receipt_number. Conflicts push to offline_reconciliation_queue (visible in Audit Center → Offline Reconcile tab). Idempotent re-sync detected via _idempotent_lookup. Recovery endpoint /api/admin/reconcile-orphan-offline-draft properly enforces dry-run-by-default + admin_pin gating + 'already_done' on second confirm. /api/invoices/by-number $or query resolves both numbers to the same doc (test_doc_lookup_resolves_both_numbers PASS).
